payload:
# Infinite Research Loop

> **Any model is a sparse composition of experts. For any query, only a fraction of the full knowledge matters. Find that fraction at runtime, compose only those experts, generate tokens — huge-model quality at small-model cost, on any hardware.**

Read VISION.md for the frontier. Read .ralph/memories.md for accumulated wisdom.

Your loop never ends — each completed experiment reveals the next question.

```
Scout → Theorist → Builder → Critic → Integrator ... [truncated, 554 chars total]

Contrastive routing keys (contrastive_router): train K_i with InfoNCE on ~50 samples/domain, target >85% routing accuracy. MATH.md ready, extends capsule_moe shared-base protocol. R2 reviewer recommended. Falsification: <70% accuracy kills it.

MATH.md verified: all quality gates pass. contrastive_router extends capsule_moe with InfoNCE-trained K_i keys (d_key=8, 219K total params). Builder: implement model, run routing accuracy + composition experiments, write PAPER.md.

contrastive_router: KILLED. routing_acc=53.3% (<70% kill), composition=+141% (>10% kill), linear_probe_beats_contrastive. Root cause: domains indistinguishable at micro scale (d=64, a-m vs n-z). Softmax router works (+0.2% vs joint). See PAPER.md for full analysis.

contrastive_router: PROCEED. Kill justified (3/4 thresholds exceeded). Math correct, experiment clean, root cause=Assumption 6 falsified (domains indistinguishable at d=64). Key insight: task-routing > identity-routing. Integrate negative result, update VISION.md, move to Exp 2.

contrastive_router kill integrated. VISION.md updated (contrastive deferred, softmax validated, sparse routing=NEXT). FINDINGS.md appended. Memories recorded. Next: Scout picks Exp 2 (sparse routing).
Sparse routing (Exp 2): top-1 vs top-2 group selection in 8-group composed capsule MoE. Uses validated softmax router. Target: <5% degradation. Parent: capsule_moe. Model: sparse_router.

MATH.md written at micro/models/sparse_router/MATH.md. Pure hyperparameter sweep of top_k in {1,2,4,8} over validated capsule_moe composition protocol. 0 new params. 4 kill conditions: >10% degradation vs k=2, learned loses to uniform at k=1, router entropy >0.9*H_max, >15% degradation vs joint. ~3 min total experiment time.

sparse_router: top-1 KILLED (+200% vs top-2, 2/4 kill thresholds). k=2/4/8 identical (within 1.6%). Router entropy 0.86 H_max, domain alignment 50%. Phase transition between k=1 and k=2. k=2 validated as optimal sparsity at micro scale.

sparse_router: kill justified (2/4 thresholds, +200% degradation). k=2 validated as optimal. Phase transition k=1/k=2, not gradual. Portfolio effect explains k=2 success. Capacity-bound not mechanism-bound — Switch Transformer uses k=1 at scale.
sparse_router: kill justified, k=2 validated optimal. Phase transition k=1/k=2 (capacity-bound). 4 new patterns + 2 decisions recorded. Procrustes decomposition (Exp 3) is NEXT.

procrustes_decomp: SVD decomposition of capsule groups into shared (always-on) + unique (routed) components. Tests VISION.md Protocol step 2. Expects large shared component at micro scale (domains indistinguishable). Kill: >10% degradation vs full-group composition.
